title: Variables and expressions
goalText: Treat aim as data your program can store and reuse.
machineObjectiveText: Send the ball into the boosted lane on purpose.
boardMeaningText: The first topic is simple: bonus_lane tells you where the current bonus is, and your code can follow it.
nextActionText: Aim into the bonus lane on purpose. Each successful run adds one progress step toward the checkpoint.
unlockSpotlightText: Aim control is unlocked. You can now read bonus_lane, store it in a variable, and send that value into set_aim(...).

title: Conditionals
goalText: React to the board instead of aiming the same way every run.
machineObjectiveText: Open the return gate on the jackpot side, then cash it in on the return side.
boardMeaningText: Conditionals now control the glowing side rails: one side opens the gate, the other side cashes it in.
nextActionText: Use if/else to follow jackpot_side. A successful run opens or spends the return gate and adds one progress step.
unlockSpotlightText: Side rails are installed. One side is the jackpot side, the other is the return side, and your code can react to them live.

title: Functions
goalText: Store one reusable tactic and call it when you need it.
machineObjectiveText: Arm the echo target and then land the next aligned shot on it.
boardMeaningText: A helper call can now arm a visible echo target on the board, turning one reusable tactic into a visible payoff.
nextActionText: Call your helper function during a good run. If it arms or triggers the echo target, the run adds one progress step.
unlockSpotlightText: Echo target is unlocked. Calling your helper function can now arm a glowing target on the board for the next aligned shot.

title: Loops
goalText: Repeat one good tactic on purpose instead of rewriting it by hand.
machineObjectiveText: Charge the combo lights and turn them into a lightning-ready burst.
boardMeaningText: Loops feed the board repeatedly, lighting the feeder bulbs and turning a full charge into a visible lightning state.
nextActionText: Wrap your tactic in for _ in range(n):. A run that charges the feeder or resolves lightning adds one progress step.
unlockSpotlightText: Combo feeder is unlocked. Repeating a tactic now charges visible feeder lights and can release lightning shots.
